product.name: Dog Stairs for Small Dogs, 4-Step Dog Ramp for Bed 19.7" H, Dogs Steps for Bed, Couch, Pet Stairs with Non-Slip Bottom Design, Cat Scratching, High Density Foam Portable Pet Steps, Indoor, Grey
features: 【Multi-Functional Pet Stairs】Ahpmeoa multi-functional dog stairs is a fantastic addition to any pet owner's home! The combination of climbing, playing, cat scratching in one unite is incredibly convenient.

【Different Size to Choose】This dog stair has 2 steps, 3 steps, 4 steps and 5 steps to choose. Our 2-step stairs fits for chair/sofa/bed up to 13inch. 3-step stairs fits for chair/sofa/bed up to 17inch. 4-step stairs fits for chair/sofa/bed up to 21inch. And 5-step stairs fits for chair/sofa/bed up to 24inch.

【Safe and Steady Design】Curved steps provides maximum climbing comfort for puppies and kittens. Surface layer of the dog ladder is made of thick 90% Polyester, 10% Other fiber, providing a soft and non-slip experience for your pet's feet. High-density of pure foam make the stair more steady when your pets walk on.

【Easy to Clean】The dog step has a removable washable cover made of bonded fleece that can be hand washed or machine washed, so you don't require spending a lot of time cleaning it. It's very convenient.

【Notice】The pet ramp is vacuum-packed and may take 24-48 hours to fully rebound, depending on the temperature, the higher the temperature, the faster the rebound. For added stability, please place the stairs against a stable surface like a sofa, bed, or wall during use.
